use_cases: FAQ sections for websites seeking to answer common user questions in an organized manner
Portfolio or personal website about sections showcasing designer background and philosophy
Product feature explanations with visual support through accompanying imagery
Content-heavy landing pages requiring collapsible information architecture
Personal brand storytelling with expandable sections for depth
ai_summary: A designer portfolio accordion component featuring five expandable items with accompanying images, titles, and descriptive content. Built with a minimalist flat design using Tailwind CSS, it displays collapsible content sections about the designer's identity, approach, and philosophy. The single-select accordion pattern allows one item to remain open by default while enabling smooth expand/collapse interactions on click.
